patterns.pattern: Built for men who [struggle/action], even when [difficulty].
patterns.example: Built for men who keep showing up, even when nothing feels certain.

patterns.pattern: Return to [internal concept] — not [external thing], but [deeper meaning].
patterns.example: Return to yourself — not nature outside, but your internal nature.
patterns.notes: Core brand differentiator. High emotional resonance.

patterns.pattern: Part of a rare sourced release. [Scarcity signal]. [Intentionality signal].
patterns.example: Part of a rare sourced release. Not mass produced. Chosen with intention.
patterns.notes: Creates urgency without hype. On brand.
